problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Ketamine-like. Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
